name: golden-gates-fighting-for-housing-in-america
description: Conor Dougherty's account of America's housing crisis through the San Francisco Bay Area, where technology growth collides with anti-development zoning.
useCase: Understand the housing crisis, its causes, and the political battles over zoning, rent control, and development.
knownRisks: Focuses on San Francisco Bay Area, other cities may have different dynamics
Housing policy varies significantly by jurisdiction
